resources.string: Observes hardware key events and sends your configured local HTTP requests.
Accessibility service: disabled — button detection cannot work
1. Open app info / allow restricted settings
Waiting for one hardware button press…

Because this APK is installed outside Google Play, Android blocks Accessibility by default.

1. Open app info, tap the ⋮ menu, then Allow restricted settings.
2. Open accessibility settings and enable the service.
3. Return here, tap Detect, and press the hardware button once.
